{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-248", "name": "Uncaught Exception"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-754", "name": "Improper Check for Unusual or Exceptional Conditions"}], "description": "A single unauthenticated WebSocket message to `/rpc` crashed the SurrealDB server. Sending `use { db: "x" }` without first selecting a namespace hit `.expect("namespace should be set")` in the `use` handler; because `surrealdb-core` is built with `panic = 'abort'`, the panic terminated the process. `use` is callable before `signin`, and the per-method capability check passes by default for guest callers — so no credentials, token, or `--allow-guests` flag are required.

### Impact

An unauthenticated remote attacker who could reach the `/rpc` endpoint could crash the SurrealDB server with a single WebSocket message. No credentials, token, session knowledge, or capability are required.

### Patches

A patch has been introduced that returns a typed `invalid_params` response when `db` is set on a session with no `ns`, replacing the panic.

- Versions 3.1.0 and later are not affected by this issue.

### Workarounds

Affected users who are unable to update should restrict network access to the `/rpc` endpoint to trusted clients, and run SurrealDB under a process supervisor that restarts on crash.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wjjj-24cx-f28g", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T20:04:22Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wjjj-24cx-f28g", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wjjj-24cx-f28g"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-01T20:04:22Z", "references": ["https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/security/advisories/GHSA-wjjj-24cx-f28g", "https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/commit/1537ec4fbd789c61a5b43b648a854577dbe31a34", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wjjj-24cx-f28g"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/surrealdb/surrealdb/security-advisories/GHSA-wjjj-24cx-f28g", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb", "summary": "SurrealDB has unauthenticated remote DoS via malformed RPC `use` call", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T20:04:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wjjj-24cx-f28g", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "surrealdb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.1.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: SurrealDB has unauthenticated remote DoS via malformed RPC `use` call
